$comment: THE definition of Earth - data, not code. ONE file, referenced by every scene, so improving this body improves every world that uses it. Radii m; densities kg/m3 (in-situ/compressed, PREM-style); temperatures K at each layer's inner and outer boundary, linear between. atmosphere_mass_kg is DECLARED (measured) - surface pressure is NEVER declared, it emerges as the weight of that column, P = M*g/(4*pi*R^2).
name: Earth
